'''Wilds''' were [[ungulate]]s [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to [[Kuras III]] that grazed on the plains in herds. While [[Gender/Legends|males]] and females spawned, a third, separate gender, the carrier, was impregnated with the resulting young during gestation.

{{Species-stub}}
